items.title: WAOHire - Twilio Developer (Ruby) - Remote - Contractor
items.description:
**Responsibilities:**
- Platform Development: Design, configure, and optimize Twilio Flex and Studio workflows, including developing IVR systems to ensure optimal performance, scalability, and automated customer routing.
- Workflow & Automation: Implement call and messaging workflows and integrate Twilio services with internal systems (like CRMs and ticketing platforms) to boost customer support efficiency.
- Reporting & Analytics: Build comprehensive dashboards to track key metrics (such as call volume and agent productivity), provide actionable operational insights, and integrate AI-driven solutions.
- Platform Optimization: Resolve performance bottlenecks and maintain system security, reliability, and scalability to continuously improve customer interaction flows.
- Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with Product, Engineering, and Customer Operations teams to offer technical guidance on best practices for Twilio-based contact center architecture.

**Requirements:**
- At least 5 years of experience in software development.
- Backend: Proficiency in TypeScript or Ruby.
- Frontend: Experience with React.
- Cloud: Experience with serverless compute and distributed storage patterns. 
- Experience or a strong desire to learnb how to integrate AI/ML models into production environments (e.g., for transcription, data extraction, or automated analysis) is a major advantage.
- Integration: Skilled in building "glue" between platforms (e.g., pulling Zendesk notes via API to enrich communication logs). 
- Fluent in English (both verbal and written)
**Nice to have:**
- Experience with CPaaS platforms (Twilio, AWS Connect, or Vonage).
- A background in Fintech or highly regulated industries (familiarity with handling sensitive data)

**Benefits:**
- Competitive salary (upto $3000 Net)
- Contractor signing, no SHUI included
- Remote working (only for Vietnamese candidates currently located in Vietnam)
- Working in a professional, friendly, well-equipped environment both with foreigners and Vietnamese.
- Extensive on job training, you will always have a chance to work with new emerging technologies.

Contact:
- Zalo: 0834033300

items.title: Senior AI Engineer (OCR, YOLO) (Range: 3000 USD)
items.description:
**Apply via: 0944503069 (Zalo) (Hoang Nhi)**

**WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING**
• You will join the AI Engineering team within an innovative manufacturing and construction technology environment, collaborating closely with the US team to design and develop AI services that enhance product performance and deliver measurable business impact.
• Design, develop, and maintain scalable end-to-end machine learning pipelines for automated vision processing
• Build systems for symbol detection, drawing interpretation, floor plan parsing, and quantity extraction from construction documents (PDFs, CAD exports, blueprints).
• Develop and fine-tune object detection and segmentation models to identify construction elements (walls, doors, windows, fixtures, framing, hardware components, etc.).
• Implement OCR/YOLO and document layout analysis pipelines to extract annotations, dimensions, and labels from technical drawings.
• Apply advanced ML techniques including transformer-based vision models and multi-label classification.
• Conduct model evaluation, benchmarking, hyperparameter optimization, and performance tuning.
• You will also be responsible for creating and optimizing core modules of the MLOps platform, from the computation layer to the orchestrator layer.
• Collaborate with software engineers to integrate ML models into production applications.
• Manage and oversee the AI vendor’s deliverables, including reviewing training approaches and datasets, and leading testing/UAT to evaluate and validate model accuracy and performance against business requirements.

**DESIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE**
If you can do everything listed above, you’ve got what it takes. Perhaps some of the following would be helpful too:
• If you can do the above, you’re a strong fit. Additionally, the following experience is highlyvaluable.
• 2+ years in Software Development (preferably construction tech, engineering, or document automation)
• 3+ years in AI/ML or Computer Vision roles
• Strong hands-on Python experience for image processing and CV pipelines ML & Computer Vision Expertise
• Design and maintain scalable end-to-end ML pipelines for automated vision processing (symbol detection, drawing interpretation, floor plan parsing, quantity extraction from PDFs/CAD/blueprints).
• Solid experience with OpenCV, Torchvision, YOLO, Detectron2, SAM, or similar.
• Proven background in Object Detection, Image Segmentation, OCR, and Document Layout Analysis (e.g., PaddleOCR, Tesseract, LayoutLM, Donut).
• Experience analyzing large sets of technical drawings and applying data augmentation for engineering documents.
• Image classification, multi-label detection, semantic & instance segmentation
• Transformer-based vision models (ViT, DETR, LayoutLM)
• Model evaluation (mAP, IoU, F1), hyperparameter tuning, model optimization
• Strong experience with PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Pandas, Albumentations, etc.
• Experience with Azure/Azure ML, AWS, or GCP

items.title: [Hybrid] Principal Platform Engineer (Azure)_Up To $7000
items.description:
Mô tả công việc
We are seeking a Principal Platform Engineer with 10+ years’ experience, with at least 7 years in designing, building, deploying and maintaining critical applications in Microsoft Azure.
Responsibilities
• Platform architecture — shared ownership of solution and Azure architecture.
• Platform build — design, build, deploy and maintain the platform.
• Azure infrastructure — provision, configure and operate Azure infrastructure.
• DevOps and CI/CD — own CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and product release.
• Security and compliance — embed security controls and compliance into the platform.

• Engineering standards — set and enforce technical standards for the team.
• Incident response — own root cause analysis and issue resolution.

• 10 years of hands-on experience in DevOps/Cloud/Platform, including 7yoe focusing on Azure

•Principal Azure platform engineering experience.
• Senior architecture and design experience.
• CI/CD, IaC and cloud-native deployment.
• Cybersecurity – authentication, encryption, zero trust and compliance frameworks.
• Cryptography – concepts and standards; post-quantum cryptography exposure preferred.
• Demonstrated delivery of technical POCs with enterprise or government customers.
• Demonstrated ability to define and enforce engineering standards in a team
environment.
• Experience owning incident response, root cause analysis and resolution.
• Strong written and spoken English 
 

Phúc lợi và chính sách
•Attractive salary 

• Opportunity to travel to New Zealand 

• Opportunity to work with a global team 

• Other benefits to be confirmed

Quy trình phỏng vấn
1-2 vòng

items.title: LeapXpert - Knowledge System Lead - Ho Chi Minh - FT
items.description:
# **Knowledge Systems Lead (formerly Technical Writer)**

## Location 

* Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

---

## Salary Expectation 

* Competitive, based on experience

---

## Requirements

### Must Have

* Systems thinking mindset (designing scalable knowledge infrastructure)
* Strong written communication and content structuring skills
* Ability to identify inaccuracies, inconsistencies, and compliance risks in documentation
* Familiarity with version control and structured documentation workflows

### Ideally

* Experience in fintech, compliance, or regulated SaaS environments
* Familiarity with structured authoring (e.g., DITA, reusable content systems)
* Prompt engineering experience for documentation or knowledge systems
* Experience working closely with product managers and engineers

---

## Responsibilities

Great power comes with great responsibility — in this role, you’ll own how knowledge is created, structured, and scaled across the organization.

### You’ll be responsible for

* Designing and operating an end-to-end AI-assisted documentation pipeline
* Defining documentation toolchains (docs-as-code, versioning, publishing)
* Establishing and enforcing content standards across product squads
* Acting as a quality gate for AI-generated documentation (accuracy, compliance, consistency)
* Building and maintaining knowledge architecture and taxonomy
* Ensuring documentation is machine-readable and optimized for AI (RAG, search, chatbots)
* Embedding documentation into the product development lifecycle as a release requirement
* Enabling product squads to self-serve documentation through structured workflows

### You can bring

* Strong analytical thinking and ability to design scalable systems
* Attention to detail, especially in high-stakes or regulated environments
* Ability to operate in ambiguity and define processes from scratch
* Proactive mindset — identifying risks, not just gaps

---

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Work on cutting-edge AI + product infrastructure in a fast-growing global company
* Be part of a product-driven, agile organization with real ownership
* Collaborate with a diverse, international team
* Competitive compensation and benefits
* Opportunities for career growth and learning new technologies
* Premium healthcare, flexible leave policy, and team activities

---

## Interesting Engineering Projects 
* Building an agentic AI-powered documentation pipeline
* Creating a machine-readable knowledge base for AI retrieval and grounding
* Designing scalable documentation systems across 15+ product squads
* Enabling zero-lag documentation shipping alongside product releases

---

## Contact

Homepage: [https://www.leapxpert.com/](https://www.leapxpert.com)
Contact recruiter for more details: Thao - 0399596647 (zalo/whatsapp)

items.title: Remote Opportunity - Senior Software Engineer (Python) - Open salary
items.description:
**About the role**

- As a Senior Software Engineer at Inspectorio, you will be responsible for working with cross-functional teams, including Product Owners, Designers, and Quality Assurance Engineers, to conceptualize, develop, and deploy software features that meet customer needs.
- While this role is primarily backend-focused, our current priorities place a stronger emphasis on frontend capabilities. As such, we are open to hiring a Senior Software Engineer with either strong backend expertise in Python, or fullstack experience with a frontend focus in Angular alongside Python.

**What you'll do**

- Design, develop, and maintain high-performance backend services using Python and Django. 
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including designers, product managers, and other engineers, to deliver high-quality software solutions. 
- Work closely with Customer Support and QA teams to investigate and resolve customer-reported incidents, bugs, and requests in a timely and professional manner. 
- Utilize AI tools (e.g., code assistants, automated testing, log analyzers) to streamline development tasks and routine operations. 
- Demonstrate strong communication and collaboration skills, participating actively in team discussions, planning sessions, and retrospectives. 
- Architect and implement new features and services that meet business requirements. 
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code adhering to best practices and industry standards. 
- Lead code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and mentor junior developers to enhance the team’s capabilities. 
- Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve performance bottlenecks and other backend issues. 
- Stay current with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices, particularly in Python and Django. 
- Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability while ensuring security and data protection standards. 
- Contribute to the improvement of the development process, including continuous integration and deployment strategies.

**Qualifications**

- 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong emphasis on Python and Django. 
- Deep understanding of object-oriented programming, design patterns, and other OOP principles such as SOLID and GRASP. 
- Experience with RESTful APIs, API-first approach, and microservices architecture. 
- Proficient in working with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar. 
- Experience with asynchronous programming and related frameworks like Celery. 
- Proficient with version control systems, particularly Git. 
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and their services. 
- Experience using AI assistants in the development workflow (e.g., Copilot, Cursor). 
- Proven ability to work independently and within cross-functional teams. 
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and container orchestration tools like Kubernetes 
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment. 
- Great communication skills, in English, both written and verbal.

**Nice to have**

- Experience with Angular (v18+) and modern frontend development. 
- Ability to contribute across the fullstack (backend + frontend). 
- Interest in AI-augmented development and modern engineering workflows.

**Benefit**

- Tax payment and full salary insurance coverage
- Premium healthcare PVI 
- Lunch allowance
- Well-being claim 
- Unlimited Annual Leave: We prioritize your well-being and trust you to manage your time.
- Flexible Working: Whether from home, a coffee shop, or our global hubs, work where you're most comfortable.
- Project Ownership: You get to lead  the initiatives you're passionate about, professionally or socially.
- Global, diverse, and innovative team: Be part of a welcoming community from 20+ countries, where unique perspectives drive innovation.

Feel free to contact me at +84395392802 - Talent Acquisition Partner

items.title: Momos - Mid/Senior Full-Stack Engineer - Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam - FT
items.description:
## Location

* Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam (Hybrid)

## Salary Expectation

* Competitive, based on experience

## Requirements

* Experience building applications on a modern web technology stack
* Strong backend web development background — NodeJS preferred; other frameworks (Express, Django, Flask, Spring, Play, etc.) also welcome
* Proficiency with modern frontend web technologies — ES6+, React, and Redux are a big plus
* Well-versed with relational database technologies
* Hands-on experience with public cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP), including serverless application model
* **Decent English communication** skills to collaborate with global team members

## Skills

### Must Have

* NodeJS (or equivalent modern backend framework)
* ReactJS / modern frontend stack
* Relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc.)
* English 🙏 (**All interviews are conducted in English**)

### Nice to Have

* Experience building in-app predictive analytics
* Experience with microservices migration
* Passion for open-source community and contributions
* Domain expertise in ad-tech or F&B technology
* AWS, Temporal, Clouds.

## Responsibilities

* Build powerful web applications using NodeJS and ReactJS
* Contribute to technical architecture design for new products and enhancements to existing products
* Collaborate closely with software engineers, product managers, and designers
* Mentor other engineers via code reviews, code pairs, and knowledge sharing
* Take ownership of key platform features from design through implementation and operation

## Why It Would Be Awesome to Work With Us

* Mission-driven, fast-paced startup environment shaping the future of the F&B industry
* Trusted by over 5,000 businesses globally
* Collaborative and flat company culture
* Private medical insurance
* Paid time off and flexible working culture
* Access to the latest technology and tools for personal development
* Comprehensive onboarding program
* Employee recognition programs
* Discretionary trips to visit teams/offices in the region
* Cross-cultural team bonding and networking

## About Momos

Momos is a rapidly growing company headquartered in Singapore and San Diego. Founded in 2020 by food tech experts from Grab, Uber, Microsoft, and Intuit, our mission is to help food and beverage, retail, and other multi-location businesses drive their entire customer lifecycle, powered by AI. Learn more at [momos.com](https://www.momos.com).

## Contact
Please DM me before applying for the job at this link: https://wrkbl.ink/2lQa6SD

 ⚠️ **Applications submitted via the link without a direct message will not be considered.**

* **Contact person:** Kai
* **Email:** thien+kai-WB@momos.com
* **WeBuild Slack:** https://we-build-vn.slack.com/team/U01S1J87ARH

• Review product requirements and develop test matrix. 
• Build test plan, design test case, execute and report test progress, bugs, and results to management. 
• Automate test cases and assist in the architecture, crafting and implementing of test frameworks. 
• Manage bug lifecycle and co-work with inter-groups to drive for solutions. 
• In-house repro and verify customer issues/fixes. 

What we need to see: 
• 2+ years QA experience. 
• Proficient in Unix/Linux and shell/python programming skills. 
• Rich experience in test cases development, tests automation in API/UI and failure analysis. 
• Solid experience with AI development tools, including creating test cases, automating test cases
• Good knowledge and hands-on experience in model testing and LLM benchmarking 
• Good QA sense including attention to detail, problem-solving, data analysis, quality standards knowledge, time management etc. 
• Excellent communicator, fluent written and verbal English.

### Why it would be awesome to work with us

* 15 days annual leave, 10 sick leave
* Annual Performance Bonus
* Company activities and events
* Learning and development plan

Prepare SRS documents when required.

Record, manage, and verify defects (bugs).


Report testing results to the QC Team Lead and Project Manager (PM).


Communicate directly with internal teams and clients on issues arising during the testing process.

Strong time management skills and proactive working attitude.

Bachelor’s degree in IT or related fields.


Basic IT knowledge and familiarity with at least one programming language.


Good English (or Japanese) reading comprehension (TOEIC 450+).


Detail-oriented with strong logical thinking.


Proficiency in JavaScript with experience in at least one framework/library (e.g., jQuery, AngularJS, ReactJS, …).


GPA 6.0 or higher (please attach transcripts in your CV).



🔹 Benefits:
Salary: Up to 30m++ (based on capability) + 13th-month salary + Tết bonus.


 Healthcare Insurance.


Modern equipment (MacBook, iPhone).


Benefits: Team building, Happy Hours, dynamic and young environment.


 Clear career development path with professional growth opportunities.

items.title: [HCMC, Onsite] AI DATA PYTHON
items.description:
📍 Location: HB Tower, 699 Điện Biên Phủ Street, Ward 25, Bình Thạnh District, HCMC
 ⏰ Working Hours:
Monday – Friday: 08:30 – 18:00 (Lunch break: 12:00 – 13:30)


Saturday: 08:30 – 12:30 (Work From Home)
 👤 Direct Manager: Project Manager / Senior Management



Overview
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated AI/ML Engineer to join our AI Assistant Platform team.
In this role, you will design, develop, and deploy advanced AI/ML models and services that power intelligent features, natural language processing, and real-time inference.
You’ll collaborate closely with platform engineers, data scientists, and cloud architects to ensure AI solutions are scalable, reliable, and deeply integrated into our intelligent applications.

Key Responsibilities
Design and develop scalable AI/ML solutions and production-ready models for core AI Assistant capabilities (e.g., natural language understanding, generation).
Own the end-to-end lifecycle of AI/ML models, from initial experimentation and training to testing, validation, and deployment in production environments.
Architect and optimize ML infrastructure across distributed cloud environments (AWS, GCP, or Azure) to support high-throughput, low-latency inference.
Implement robust model monitoring, versioning, and performance optimization frameworks (e.g., drift detection, A/B testing) to maintain model integrity and quality.
Partner with backend engineers to integrate AI/ML services with the AI Assistant core platform.
Enforce model fairness, security, and performance best practices across the entire ML lifecycle.
Required Skills & Qualifications
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or a related quantitative field.
2+ years of experience in AI/ML engineering, machine learning, or software development with a strong focus on AI.
Proficiency in Python and popular ML libraries (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn) for model development and prototyping.
Strong experience with MLOps practices and tools (e.g., MLflow, Kubeflow, Sagemaker) for automating the model development and deployment pipeline.
Deep understanding of machine learning algorithms, model training, and evaluation techniques.
Experience with cloud-based compute and ML services (e.g., AWS SageMaker, Google AI Platform, Azure ML).
Expertise in productionizing and scaling AI/ML models in a high-traffic, low-latency production environment.
Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
Preferred Qualifications
Proven experience with Large Language Models (LLMs), Natural Language Processing (NLP), or Computer Vision applications.
Hands-on experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and fine-tuning LLMs.
Knowledge of containerization and orchestration tools (Docker, Kubernetes).
Ability to work cross-functionally in Agile or fast-paced R&D environments.
Good to have experienced with Agentic AI application.
Why Join Us
Play a pivotal role in building the AI models and services for a next-generation AI Assistant Platform.
Collaborate with a world-class team of AI, data, and platform engineers on cutting-edge technologies.
Contribute to a scalable architecture that supports real-time AI experiences across industries.
What We Offer
💰 Competitive salary & performance-based bonus + 13th-month salary + holiday/Tết bonuses.
🏥 Healthcare Insurance.
💻 Modern equipment (MacBook, iPhone).
🎯 Team building, Happy Hours, dynamic and young work environment.
📚 Clear career path with opportunities for professional development.
📩 Apply Now
Email: hr@gontech.asia

Senior Backend Engineer (Python)
📍 Location: Bình Thạnh, Ho Chi Minh City
 🕒 Working model: Full-time
 👤 Reports to: Tech Lead / Engineering Manager

 Job Summary
We are looking for a highly skilled Senior Backend Engineer (Python) to join our engineering team. You will play a key role in designing, building, and optimizing backend systems that are scalable, secure, maintainable, and aligned with long-term product strategy.
 You will also mentor junior engineers, participate in architectural discussions, and contribute to solving complex technical challenges across the platform.

 Responsibilities
Take full ownership and show strong commitment to every task, from development to deployment
Proactively report progress, and planned tasks, and blockers to the team.


Work closely with Design, Frontend, and QC teams to deliver features that meet both business and technical requirements.


Ensure high code quality by following Clean Code, linting standards, Conventional Commit rules, and ensuring all QC test cases are passed.


System Design & Development
Design, build, and optimize backend architecture for scalability, performance, security, maintainability, and reliability.


Develop and maintain RESTful APIs, WebSocket, and Server-sent Event
Participate in system improvement initiatives and contribute ideas for architectural enhancement.


Leadership & Mentorship
Review code, provide feedback, and mentor junior/mid-level engineers.


Share best practices, guidelines, and technical knowledge with the team.



 Requirements
Education
Bachelor’s degree or currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Students are welcome to apply


Experience


Ability to read and apply English technical documentation.


Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments is a plus.
Having experience in building, maintaining and operating AI applications is a plus"
Technical Skills
Strong experience with Python, Django, FastAPI and familiarity with modern AI-assisted development tools.


Solid understanding of software design principles:


OOP, Design Patterns


Event-driven Architecture


Microservices


Message Queue systems


Clean Architecture


Database experience:


MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis


schema design, query optimization, indexing, performance tuning


Hands-on experience with:


RESTFul API, or GraphQL API, or gRPC API development


Websocket/Server-sent event


Git, Docker, CI/CD pipelines


Unit testing frameworks: pytest, unittest


Message queues: RabbitMQ, Kafka, Azure Service Bus


Strong understanding of backend security and performance best practices.



 Nice to Have


Packaging & distribution experience: seed data, licensing/subscriptions, install wizards.


Integration experience with datamart/reporting systems: ClickHouse, Metabase, Power BI.


Strong understanding of web security (OWASP ASVS), RBAC/SoD, object-level permission models.


🔹 Benefits
  Salary : Up to $1500 
 85% salary during probation.


 Attractive salary package, including 13th-month bonus.


 Provided with MacBook & iPhone 16e.


 Premium healthcare package.


 Monthly Happy Hour & annual company trips.


 Opportunity to improve English skills with international clients.


 Exposure to new tech stacks for business growth.


 Flexible working hours & attractive annual leave policy.



📩 Apply Now

items.title: LINE Vietnam - Network and Security Management Role - Saigon, District 10
items.description:
## Location

* District 10, HCMC, Vietnam

## Salary Expectation

* Market-Competitive and very attractive

## Summary
* This role is responsible for systematically establishing and operating LINE VIETNAM's network and security management system and strengthening the company's security.
* Through the implementation of network and security policies and risk assessments, it ensures the confidentiality, integrity, and availability (CIA) of data and systems, and provides security guidelines and training programs for company employees. Additionally, it responds to relevant laws and regulatory requirements through internal control and audit response activities, playing a role in improving the organization’s network and security level and minimizing risks

### Responsibilities

* Doing forensic on abused/fraud cases.
* Assess the impact of potential compromises and potential threat activity.
* Develop and implement security policies and procedures: This includes creating and maintaining policies that govern how employees interact with IT systems and data, as well as setting up procedures for incident response and business continuity.
* Conduct risk assessments: Evaluate potential vulnerabilities and risks to the organization’s information systems and data and develop strategies to mitigate these risks.
* Monitor network and security system: Monitor network traffic and detect potential security breaches.
* Provide security training and awareness: Educate employees on security best practices, risks, and threats, and conduct regular security awareness training programs.
* Responding to security incidents: Develop and implement incident response plans and lead efforts to investigate and remediate security breaches.
* Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements: Stay informed about relevant regulations and standards and ensure that the organization’s IT security program meets these requirements.
* Stay updated on emerging threats and technologies: Research and analyze new security threats and technologies and adapt the organization’s security program accordingly.
* Collaborate with other departments (Parent Company Security Governance team, CSIRT): Work with IT, legal, and other departments to ensure that the organization’s security program is aligned with its business goals

### Basic Qualification

* Minimum of 3 years’ work experience in an information security role including security audit, security policy development, data security, security education, security risk assessment.
* Basic understanding in modern IT and computer infrastructure.
* Must have experience on log analysis.
* Must familiarity with UNIX.
* Must have experience on scripting (Python, Perl, Bash, awk, sed).
* Should have experience and passion on incident investigation and time-series data analysis.
* Must be familiar with Information Security Management Systems (ISMS) or Privacy Information Management System and its practices.
* Ability to implement security monitoring process to align with global security standards and requirements e.g. ISO/IEC 27001, NIST Cybersecurity Framework.
* Competence in conducting risk assessments and security audits in diverse IT environments.
* Understanding characteristic of cybercrimes.
* Team orientated person who can communicate with teams from different countries/ departments.
* Fluent in English.

### Preferred Qualification
* Information security certificates, such as CISSP, CISA, CISM, ISO/IEC 27001 Lead Auditor.
* Understanding Personal Data Protection Act.
* Understanding of Internet, instant messengers, web/mobile services and encryption technology.
* Japanese or Korean language skill is a plus.

### Interview process

2 rounds, offline at office

Round 1: Technical interview – up to 2 hours
Round 2: Culture fit – up to 45 minutes

### Contact
Send your CV to email: tungnt@linecorp.com
Contact: [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ngthtung/)

items.title: Lifeframe - Senior React Developer - Remote/Vietnam - FT Contractor
items.description:
## Location

* Vietnam

## Salary

* $2000 USD/month

## The Vision

**LifeFrame** is a visual-first life design platform that transforms how people plan their lives. Every activity gets AI-generated imagery. Scheduling works like humans think—"2 PM Tuesday" OR "morning on weekdays"—with bidirectional calendar sync. Social features let users share and "ReFrame" life practices (like forking code, but for habits) with built-in attribution and revenue sharing.

**This isn't another productivity app.** It's life design tool like nothing you’ve seen before. 

We're **bootstrapped, self-funded, fundamentally innovative**. No VC pressure, no pivots, just clear technical vision. Senior technical lead already built the foundation—GitHub repo ready, architecture started and developing fast. You'll build the visual experience that makes life design feel intuitive and beautiful.

## The Role

Build the frontend that brings LifeFrame to life. We need stunning UI/UX—not just functional, but inspiring. We have already created stunning FIGMA designs so it’s a matter of executing our created designs and make the experience smooth and fast loading. Users should feel excited opening the app every morning. You'll also handle mobile deployment (Android/iOS) as we expand beyond web. Work closely with SpringBoot backend developer via REST APIs.

## What You'll Build

* Visual-first UI for Frames (life design containers with AI imagery)
* Multi-scheduling interface (specific times + flexible dayparts)
* Calendar integration UI (sync status, conflict resolution)
* Social features (ReFraming, attribution, sharing)
* Responsive web app (Next.js 15) + mobile apps (React Native)
* AI imagery generation flows and loading states
* Real-time collaboration features

## Required Skills

### Must Have

* Frontend: 5-8 years experience, expert in React, Next.js 15, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Selenium
* Mobile: React Native experience (Android + iOS deployment)
* UI/UX: Strong design sense, responsive design, component libraries
* State Management: Redux or similar, complex data flows

### Nice To Have

* WebSocket/real-time features, OpenAI API integration, calendar UI patterns, animation libraries

## What We're Looking For

### Technically:
* Can build beautiful, performant UIs that feel polished
* Understands complex state management (scheduling + calendar sync = non-trivial)
* Mobile app deployment experience (App Store + Google Play)
* Strong attention to visual detail and user experience

### Culturally

* Excited by the mission - care about building tools that help people design better lives
* Design-minded - not just "make it work," but "make it beautiful"
* Self-directed - you own the frontend, make decisions, ship quality
* Startup mentality - move fast, wear multiple hats (web + mobile) 
    
## What We Offer

* Ground-zero impact—define the visual language users will love
* Modern stack (Next.js 15, React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS)
* High ownership—frontend is yours to shape
* Growth path to frontend leadership as team scales
* Equity options available
* Remote, flexible, no VC pressure

## Techstack

* Frontend: Next.js 15, React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Redux
* Mobile: React Native
* Backend: SpringBoot, PostgreSQL (handled by backend team)
* Infrastructure: AWS, Docker, GitHub

## Apply

Email quynh@lifeframe.app with:
1. Resume + GitHub + **portfolio/live projects
2. Brief answers
    - Why does LifeFrame resonate with you?
    - Show us your best UI work (links/screenshots)
    - Your React Native + mobile deployment experience?
    - How do you approach complex state management?

## Contact

items.title: LINE Vietnam - Frontend Engineer - HCM - Fulltime/Hybrid
items.description:
## Location

* Viettel Tower, Cách Mạng Tháng Tám, Phường 12, Quận 10, Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam

## Salary Expectation

* Competitive

## Responsibilities
* Implement frontend for web / mobile applications with modern technologies and framework
* Improve the efficiency of existing products
* Build the architecture and design of new products and features
* Research new technologies to apply in the current and future projects
* Implement UI components and libraries
* Write technical specifications based on conceptual design, business/technical requirements

the hood

* Experience building multilingual and globally distributed web services
* Experience in developing mobile web applications
* Familiarity with source control (git/git-flow) and code review
* Familiarity with end-to-end testing tools such as Playwright or Cypress

* Good at both verbal and non-verbal English

## Why you'll love working here
* Dynamic, Innovative and Friendly Working Environment.
* Top Attractive Salary.
* Working with top professional experts with latest and challenging technologies for Line app and Line eco-system

* Over 5 years of experience in backend development.
* Proficiency in Java and Spring Boot frameworks.
* Experience with databases such as MySQL and messaging systems like Kafka.

* Familiarity with Kotlin is a plus.
* Strong understanding of writing and maintaining test codes.
* Excellent communication skills and a team-oriented mindset.
* Ability to critically analyze systems and propose improvement

* Top Attractive Salary.
* Working with top professional experts with latest and challenging technologies for Line app and Line eco-system
